note: v398: Budget gains three things. (1) Tap a paycheck to enter what you were actually paid — it shows what's left after that check's bills (green if positive, red if short). (2) Mark each bill paid with the circle on its row — paid bills get a green check + strikethrough, tracked per month. (3) Budget bills now show on the dashboard calendar as red chips on their due day (struck through once paid), tapping through to the Budget page. Run the new SQL (profiles.paycheck_amounts, profiles.bill_paid).
